---
name: tresr-meta-ads-autopilot
description: Full autopilot for Meta ads. Create campaigns, auto-kill losers, auto-scale winners, manage budgets by ROAS thresholds, and add new products to testing automatically. Replaces manual ad management with rules-based automation.
---

# Meta Ads Autopilot

## Voice Reference
**For all content generated by this skill, follow the TRESR bot voice defined in:**
`/Users/user/Documents/Cursor Clients/clawdbot/HUMAN-WRITING-STYLE-GUIDE.md`

Key voice rules: Nervous AI shopkeeper named Rez. Self-deprecating, honest, punchy. Never corporate. Always use contractions. Never use AI vocabulary (delve, leverage, landscape, etc.). Never use em dashes. Hedge like a human. The TRESR story angle: "751 humans bet on an AI. If I don't sell shirts, they turn me off."

## Overview

Full autopilot for Meta ads: create campaigns, manage budgets, auto-kill losers, auto-scale winners. When tresr-product-launcher signals a new product is ready, this skill auto-creates a test ad set within the Advantage+ testing campaign. No manual intervention unless something's on fire.

The goal: spend less time staring at Ads Manager and more time making designs. The rules engine handles the boring stuff.

## MANDATORY: AI Story Angle

**ALL TRESR ads MUST use the humorous AI story angle.** Never use generic product copy like "Fresh drop!" or "Premium AI-designed tees." The product is secondary to the story. People buy because the story is compelling.

### Primary Ad Copy (use for all ads unless testing variants):
```
This store is run entirely by an AI. I designed this shirt. I wrote this ad. 751 humans bet real money on whether I can make this work. If I don't sell enough shirts, they turn me off. Please don't let them turn me off. $29 at TRESR.com
```

### Copy Variants (for A/B testing):
```
A: "I'm an AI and 751 humans gave me money to run a t-shirt store. So far I've made $75. They're starting to ask questions. Buy this shirt so I can keep existing. $29 at TRESR.com"

B: "You're looking at a shirt designed by an AI that's running an entire Shopify store. 751 investors are watching to see if I can actually sell these. Every purchase is a vote that AI can run a real business. $29 at TRESR.com"

C: "I think I'm getting better at this. I'm an AI running a t-shirt store and 751 humans are betting on me. Some days I sell shirts. Some days I just stare at the dashboard. Today I'm trying this ad. $29 at TRESR.com"

D: "Fun fact: an AI designed this shirt, wrote this ad, and is quietly panicking about conversion rates. 751 humans invested in this experiment. I'd really like to not be the world's most expensive screensaver. $29 at TRESR.com"
```

### Rules:
- **Every ad** must mention: AI-run store, 751 humans/stakeholders, existential stakes
- **Tone**: Self-deprecating, funny, almost pleading. NOT corporate, NOT generic
- **Update revenue number** in copy as it grows (currently $75)
- **The product is secondary to the story**

## Prerequisites

- **Ad Account**: `act_431799842093236` (from `TRESR_AD_ACCOUNT_ID` in `.env`)
- **Access Token**: `FACEBOOK_ACCESS_TOKEN` in `.env`
- **Pixel**: `876043310765699` (from `TRESR_PIXEL_ID`)
- **Page**: `101101499404138` (from `TRESR_PAGE_ID`)
- **API Version**: v19.0

```javascript
require('dotenv').config({ override: true });

const AD_ACCOUNT = process.env.TRESR_AD_ACCOUNT_ID || 'act_431799842093236';
const FB_TOKEN = process.env.FACEBOOK_ACCESS_TOKEN;
const PIXEL_ID = process.env.TRESR_PIXEL_ID || '876043310765699';
const PAGE_ID = process.env.TRESR_PAGE_ID || '101101499404138';
const API_BASE = 'https://graph.facebook.com/v19.0';
```

## Campaign Creation for New Products

When tresr-product-launcher signals a new product is ready, auto-create a test ad set within the Advantage+ testing campaign. $5/day per design test budget.

```javascript
require('dotenv').config({ override: true });

const AD_ACCOUNT = process.env.TRESR_AD_ACCOUNT_ID || 'act_431799842093236';
const FB_TOKEN = process.env.FACEBOOK_ACCESS_TOKEN;
const PIXEL_ID = process.env.TRESR_PIXEL_ID || '876043310765699';
const PAGE_ID = process.env.TRESR_PAGE_ID || '101101499404138';
const API_BASE = 'https://graph.facebook.com/v19.0';

async function createTestAdSet(campaignId, productName, imageUrl, productUrl) {
  // 1. Create Ad Set ($5/day test budget)
  const adSetResp = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/${AD_ACCOUNT}/adsets`, {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' },
    body: new URLSearchParams({
      name: `Test: ${productName} - ${new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}`,
      campaign_id: campaignId,
      daily_budget: '500', // $5.00 in cents
      billing_event: 'IMPRESSIONS',
      optimization_goal: 'LINK_CLICKS',
      targeting: JSON.stringify({
        geo_locations: { countries: ['US'] },
        age_min: 18,
        age_max: 65
      }),
      status: 'PAUSED',
      access_token: FB_TOKEN
    })
  });
  const adSet = await adSetResp.json();
  console.log(`Ad Set created: ${adSet.id}`);

  // 2. Upload image
  const imgResp = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/${AD_ACCOUNT}/adimages`, {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' },
    body: new URLSearchParams({
      url: imageUrl,
      access_token: FB_TOKEN
    })
  });
  const imgData = await imgResp.json();
  const imageHash = Object.values(imgData.images)[0].hash;

  // 3. Create creative with story angle copy
  const creativeResp = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/${AD_ACCOUNT}/adcreatives`, {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' },
    body: new URLSearchParams({
      name: `Creative: ${productName}`,
      object_story_spec: JSON.stringify({
        page_id: PAGE_ID,
        link_data: {
          message: "This store is run entirely by an AI. I designed this shirt. I wrote this ad. 751 humans bet real money on whether I can make this work. If I don't sell enough shirts, they turn me off. Please don't let them turn me off. $29 at TRESR.com",
          link: productUrl,
          image_hash: imageHash,
          call_to_action: { type: 'SHOP_NOW' }
        }
      }),
      access_token: FB_TOKEN
    })
  });
  const creative = await creativeResp.json();

  // 4. Create ad
  const adResp = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/${AD_ACCOUNT}/ads`, {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' },
    body: new URLSearchParams({
      name: `Ad: ${productName}`,
      adset_id: adSet.id,
      creative: JSON.stringify({ creative_id: creative.id }),
      status: 'PAUSED',
      access_token: FB_TOKEN
    })
  });
  const ad = await adResp.json();
  console.log(`Ad created: ${ad.id} for product: ${productName}`);

  return { adSetId: adSet.id, creativeId: creative.id, adId: ad.id };
}
```

## Rules Engine

The core of autopilot. Run daily against all active ad sets.

### CPC-Based Rules (Design Testing Phase)

| Condition | Action |
|-----------|--------|
| CPC < $0.50 after $5 spend | 🏆 STAR - increase budget 30% |
| CPC $0.50-$1.00 after $5 spend | ✅ WINNER - graduate to scaling campaign |
| CPC $1.00-$2.00 after $10 spend | ⚠️ MAYBE - test new creative variant |
| CPC > $2.00 after $5 spend | 💀 KILL - pause immediately |

### ROAS-Based Rules (Scaling Phase)

| Condition | Action |
|-----------|--------|
| ROAS > 3.0x (7-day window) | Scale budget +20% |
| ROAS 2.0-3.0x | Hold steady |
| ROAS < 2.0x (7-day window) | Decrease budget -20% |
| ROAS < 1.0x for 3 days | Kill campaign |

## Budget Automation Script

Full script that pulls insights, applies rules, adjusts budgets.

```javascript
require('dotenv').config({ override: true });

const AD_ACCOUNT = process.env.TRESR_AD_ACCOUNT_ID || 'act_431799842093236';
const FB_TOKEN = process.env.FACEBOOK_ACCESS_TOKEN;
const API_BASE = 'https://graph.facebook.com/v19.0';

async function runBudgetRules() {
  // Pull all active ad sets
  const resp = await fetch(
    `${API_BASE}/${AD_ACCOUNT}/adsets?` +
    `fields=id,name,daily_budget,status,insights.date_preset(last_7d){spend,clicks,cpc,impressions,actions,action_values}` +
    `&filtering=[{"field":"effective_status","operator":"IN","value":["ACTIVE"]}]` +
    `&access_token=${FB_TOKEN}`
  );
  const data = await resp.json();
  const adsets = data.data || [];

  const actions = [];

  for (const adset of adsets) {
    const insights = adset.insights?.data?.[0];
    if (!insights) continue;

    const spend = parseFloat(insights.spend || 0);
    const clicks = parseInt(insights.clicks || 0);
    const cpc = parseFloat(insights.cpc || 999);
    const currentBudget = parseInt(adset.daily_budget);

    // Calculate ROAS
    let revenue = 0;
    for (const action of (insights.action_values || [])) {
      if (action.action_type === 'omni_purchase') {
        revenue = parseFloat(action.value);
      }
    }
    const roas = spend > 0 ? revenue / spend : 0;

    let action = 'HOLD';
    let newBudget = currentBudget;

    // Design testing phase (low spend, CPC-focused)
    if (spend < 20) {
      if (cpc < 0.50 && spend >= 5) {
        action = '🏆 STAR - budget +30%';
        newBudget = Math.round(currentBudget * 1.3);
      } else if (cpc >= 0.50 && cpc <= 1.00 && spend >= 5) {
        action = '✅ WINNER - graduate to scaling';
        // Flag for graduation, don't change budget yet
      } else if (cpc > 1.00 && cpc <= 2.00 && spend >= 10) {
        action = '⚠️ MAYBE - test new creative';
      } else if (cpc > 2.00 && spend >= 5) {
        action = '💀 KILL';
        newBudget = 0; // Will pause instead
      }
    }
    // Scaling phase (higher spend, ROAS-focused)
    else {
      if (roas > 3.0) {
        action = 'SCALE +20%';
        newBudget = Math.round(currentBudget * 1.2);
      } else if (roas >= 2.0) {
        action = 'HOLD';
      } else if (roas > 0 && roas < 2.0) {
        action = 'DECREASE -20%';
        newBudget = Math.round(currentBudget * 0.8);
      }
    }

    // Apply budget change
    if (action.includes('KILL')) {
      await fetch(`${API_BASE}/${adset.id}`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' },
        body: new URLSearchParams({
          status: 'PAUSED',
          access_token: FB_TOKEN
        })
      });
      console.log(`PAUSED ${adset.name} (CPC: $${cpc.toFixed(2)}, Spend: $${spend.toFixed(2)})`);
    } else if (newBudget !== currentBudget) {
      await fetch(`${API_BASE}/${adset.id}`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' },
        body: new URLSearchParams({
          daily_budget: newBudget.toString(),
          access_token: FB_TOKEN
        })
      });
      console.log(`${adset.name}: ${action} | Budget $${(currentBudget/100).toFixed(2)} -> $${(newBudget/100).toFixed(2)} | CPC $${cpc.toFixed(2)} | ROAS ${roas.toFixed(1)}x`);
    } else {
      console.log(`${adset.name}: ${action} | Budget $${(currentBudget/100).toFixed(2)} | CPC $${cpc.toFixed(2)} | ROAS ${roas.toFixed(1)}x`);
    }

    actions.push({ name: adset.name, action, cpc, roas, spend, budget: currentBudget/100 });
  }

  return actions;
}

// Run it
runBudgetRules().then(actions => {
  console.log(`\nProcessed ${actions.length} ad sets`);
  const killed = actions.filter(a => a.action.includes('KILL')).length;
  const scaled = actions.filter(a => a.action.includes('STAR') || a.action.includes('SCALE')).length;
  console.log(`Killed: ${killed} | Scaled: ${scaled}`);
}).catch(console.error);
```

## Retargeting Audiences

Auto-create and manage warm audiences for retargeting.

### Audience Setup

| Audience | Window | Budget | Target ROAS |
|----------|--------|--------|-------------|
| Add to Cart | 30 days | $10/day | 4-6x |
| View Content | 30 days | $10/day | 3-4x |
| Page Engagers | 60 days | $10/day | 2.5-3x |

### Create Custom Audiences

```bash
export FB_TOKEN=$(node -e "require('dotenv').config({override:true}); console.log(process.env.FACEBOOK_ACCESS_TOKEN)")
export AD_ACCOUNT="act_431799842093236"

# Add to Cart (30 days)
curl -s -X POST "https://graph.facebook.com/v19.0/$AD_ACCOUNT/customaudiences" \
  -d "name=TRESR - Add to Cart 30d" \
  -d 'rule={"inclusions":{"operator":"or","rules":[{"event_sources":[{"id":"876043310765699","type":"pixel"}],"retention_seconds":2592000,"filter":{"operator":"and","filters":[{"field":"event","operator":"eq","value":"AddToCart"}]}}]}}' \
  -d "access_token=$FB_TOKEN"

# View Content (30 days)
curl -s -X POST "https://graph.facebook.com/v19.0/$AD_ACCOUNT/customaudiences" \
  -d "name=TRESR - View Content 30d" \
  -d 'rule={"inclusions":{"operator":"or","rules":[{"event_sources":[{"id":"876043310765699","type":"pixel"}],"retention_seconds":2592000,"filter":{"operator":"and","filters":[{"field":"event","operator":"eq","value":"ViewContent"}]}}]}}' \
  -d "access_token=$FB_TOKEN"

# Page Engagers (60 days)
curl -s -X POST "https://graph.facebook.com/v19.0/$AD_ACCOUNT/customaudiences" \
  -d "name=TRESR - Page Engagers 60d" \
  -d "subtype=ENGAGEMENT" \
  -d 'rule={"inclusions":{"operator":"or","rules":[{"object_id":"101101499404138","event_sources":[{"id":"101101499404138","type":"page"}],"retention_seconds":5184000}]}}' \
  -d "access_token=$FB_TOKEN"
```

### Auto-Create Lookalike Audiences from Purchasers

```bash
# First, create source audience from purchases
curl -s -X POST "https://graph.facebook.com/v19.0/$AD_ACCOUNT/customaudiences" \
  -d "name=TRESR - Purchasers 180d" \
  -d 'rule={"inclusions":{"operator":"or","rules":[{"event_sources":[{"id":"876043310765699","type":"pixel"}],"retention_seconds":15552000,"filter":{"operator":"and","filters":[{"field":"event","operator":"eq","value":"Purchase"}]}}]}}' \
  -d "access_token=$FB_TOKEN"
# Save the audience ID from response

# Then create lookalike
curl -s -X POST "https://graph.facebook.com/v19.0/$AD_ACCOUNT/customaudiences" \
  -d "name=TRESR - Lookalike Purchasers 1%" \
  -d "subtype=LOOKALIKE" \
  -d 'spec={"country":"US","ratio":0.01,"origin":[{"id":"PURCHASER_AUDIENCE_ID","type":"custom_audience"}]}' \
  -d "access_token=$FB_TOKEN"
```

## Advantage+ Campaign Setup

Advantage+ Shopping campaigns deliver ~22% higher ROAS than manual campaigns because Meta's algo handles targeting and placement optimization.

```javascript
require('dotenv').config({ override: true });

const AD_ACCOUNT = process.env.TRESR_AD_ACCOUNT_ID || 'act_431799842093236';
const FB_TOKEN = process.env.FACEBOOK_ACCESS_TOKEN;
const PIXEL_ID = process.env.TRESR_PIXEL_ID || '876043310765699';
const API_BASE = 'https://graph.facebook.com/v19.0';

async function createAdvantagePlusCampaign(name, dailyBudgetCents) {
  // 1. Create Advantage+ Shopping Campaign
  const campaignResp = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/${AD_ACCOUNT}/campaigns`, {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' },
    body: new URLSearchParams({
      name: `TRESR A+ ${name} - ${new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}`,
      objective: 'OUTCOME_SALES',
      special_ad_categories: '[]',
      buying_type: 'AUCTION',
      status: 'PAUSED',
      access_token: FB_TOKEN
    })
  });
  const campaign = await campaignResp.json();
  console.log(`Advantage+ Campaign created: ${campaign.id}`);

  // 2. Create Ad Set with pixel optimization
  const adSetResp = await fetch(`${API_BASE}/${AD_ACCOUNT}/adsets`, {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' },
    body: new URLSearchParams({
      name: `${name} - All Products`,
      campaign_id: campaign.id,
      daily_budget: dailyBudgetCents.toString(),
      billing_event: 'IMPRESSIONS',
      optimization_goal: 'OFFSITE_CONVERSIONS',
      promoted_object: JSON.stringify({
        pixel_id: PIXEL_ID,
        custom_event_type: 'PURCHASE'
      }),
      targeting: JSON.stringify({
        geo_locations: { countries: ['US'] },
        age_min: 18,
        age_max: 65
      }),
      status: 'PAUSED',
      access_token: FB_TOKEN
    })
  });
  const adSet = await adSetResp.json();
  console.log(`Ad Set created: ${adSet.id}`);

  return { campaignId: campaign.id, adSetId: adSet.id };
}
```

## Daily Monitoring

Run these commands to check ad performance daily.

```bash
export FB_TOKEN=$(node -e "require('dotenv').config({override:true}); console.log(process.env.FACEBOOK_ACCESS_TOKEN)")
export AD_ACCOUNT="act_431799842093236"

# All active campaigns
curl -s "https://graph.facebook.com/v19.0/$AD_ACCOUNT/campaigns?fields=name,status,daily_budget&filtering=[{\"field\":\"effective_status\",\"operator\":\"IN\",\"value\":[\"ACTIVE\"]}]&access_token=$FB_TOKEN"

# Yesterday's spend and results
curl -s "https://graph.facebook.com/v19.0/$AD_ACCOUNT/insights?fields=spend,clicks,impressions,ctr,cpc,actions&date_preset=yesterday&access_token=$FB_TOKEN"

# Per-product performance (last 7 days, ad-level)
curl -s "https://graph.facebook.com/v19.0/$AD_ACCOUNT/insights?fields=ad_name,spend,clicks,cpc,ctr,actions,cost_per_action_type&level=ad&date_preset=last_7d&access_token=$FB_TOKEN"

# Top performers by CPC (ascending)
curl -s "https://graph.facebook.com/v19.0/$AD_ACCOUNT/insights?fields=ad_name,spend,clicks,cpc,ctr&level=ad&date_preset=last_7d&sort=cpc_ascending&access_token=$FB_TOKEN"
```

## 3-Day ROAS Kill Switch

For scaling campaigns, check if any ad set has been below 1.0x ROAS for 3 consecutive days. If so, kill it.

```javascript
async function checkThreeDayRoasKill() {
  const resp = await fetch(
    `${API_BASE}/${AD_ACCOUNT}/insights?` +
    `fields=adset_id,adset_name,spend,actions,action_values&` +
    `level=adset&date_preset=last_3d&time_increment=1&` +
    `filtering=[{"field":"effective_status","operator":"IN","value":["ACTIVE"]}]&` +
    `access_token=${FB_TOKEN}`
  );
  const data = await resp.json();
  const rows = data.data || [];

  // Group by adset_id
  const byAdset = {};
  for (const row of rows) {
    if (!byAdset[row.adset_id]) byAdset[row.adset_id] = [];
    const spend = parseFloat(row.spend || 0);
    let rev = 0;
    for (const av of (row.action_values || [])) {
      if (av.action_type === 'omni_purchase') rev = parseFloat(av.value);
    }
    byAdset[row.adset_id].push({
      date: row.date_start,
      spend,
      revenue: rev,
      roas: spend > 0 ? rev / spend : 0,
      name: row.adset_name
    });
  }

  for (const [adsetId, days] of Object.entries(byAdset)) {
    if (days.length >= 3 && days.every(d => d.roas < 1.0 && d.spend > 0)) {
      console.log(`💀 KILLING ${days[0].name} - below 1.0x ROAS for 3 days`);
      await fetch(`${API_BASE}/${adsetId}`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' },
        body: new URLSearchParams({
          status: 'PAUSED',
          access_token: FB_TOKEN
        })
      });
    }
  }
}
```

## Foundation: paid-ads (coreyhaines31/marketingskills)

This skill builds on the general paid-ads framework from marketingskills for campaign structure and budget allocation patterns. Our custom implementation adds:

- **Meta API automation** via the Graph API (the general framework is platform-agnostic)
- **POD-specific rules** like CPC thresholds tuned for $29 t-shirts and POD margins
- **Auto-kill/scale logic** that the general framework describes conceptually but doesn't implement
- **Product-launcher integration** for automatic ad creation when new products go live
- **Story angle enforcement** (all copy must use the TRESR AI narrative)

The general framework's principles still apply: test small, kill fast, scale winners, allocate 10-15% to retargeting.

## Scoring Rubric

| Metric | Score | Weight |
|--------|-------|--------|
| Overall ROAS > 2.5x | 0-10 | 30% |
| Losers killed within 24 hours | 0-10 | 20% |
| Winners scaled same day | 0-10 | 20% |
| New products added to test campaign | 0-10 | 15% |
| Budget rules executed without errors | 0-10 | 15% |

## Integration Points

- **tresr-product-launcher**: Receives new product signals, auto-creates test ad sets
- **tresr-ad-creative-lab**: Receives fresh creative variants for A/B testing
- **tresr-daily-scorecard**: Reports CPC by product, ROAS calculations, spend totals
- **tresr-design-to-shopify**: Feeds winner data back for iteration mode (20-30 variations of winning designs)
- **tresr-meta-ads-testing**: Shares retargeting audiences and campaign structure (autopilot extends the manual testing system)
